about.title: Fujian Medical Engineering Design Institute
paragraphs: Fujian Medical Engineering Design Institute Co., Ltd. is a nationally qualified engineering institute delivering integrated infrastructure solutions for complex, high-performance facilities.
With multi-disciplinary expertise and advanced digital engineering capabilities, we provide end-to-end services from feasibility studies to EPC execution and commissioning.
about.quote: We do not simply construct buildings. We engineer regulated, operational, future-ready environments.

services.title: Full Infrastructure Lifecycle Delivery
services.subtitle: We eliminate fragmentation through full lifecycle control.
